title: Repatriation Procedures. In all cases of repatriation, the affected seafarer
content: 44 shall be repatriated to the point of hire based on the travel itinerary arranged by the 45 employer: Provided, That in case of permanent or temporary incapacity or death, the 46 seafarer or his/her remains shall be repatriated to the point of hire or the seafarer's place 47 of domicile, at the option of the seafarer or the seafarer's next of kin. All costs related to 48 the repatriation and transport of the personal effects and remains of seafarers, including 49 the provision of financial security in case of abandonment of seafarers, shall be borne by 50 the shipowner or manning agency concerned. The shipowner or LMA shall expedite the 51 repatriation without prior determination of the cause of repatriation or termination of the 52 seafarer's employment. 53 54
